We automate your whole payment workflow.

Stop manual reconciliation, invoicing, and customer follow-ups. Flowily connects directly with your banks, payment gateways, and accounting ledgers to sync status dynamically.

Manual e-commerce operations are holding you back. Here's why.

Most brands try to solve scale bottlenecks by hiring more customer service and logistics staff. We solve it permanently with automated workflows.

DAILY CHAOS // MANUAL WORK

The Old Way (Manual Chaos)

  • Manual Stock Adjustments

    Logging into Shopify, Amazon, Myntra, and warehouses to edit stock counts one-by-one, risking overselling.

  • Slow Fulfillment Dispatch

    Staff copying addresses to Shiprocket/Delhivery manually, printing labels, and typing tracking links.

  • Flooded Support Inbox

    Support agents spent all day manually answering customer chats asking "Where is my order?" (WISMO tickets).

  • Abandoned Cart Leaks

    Losing 70%+ of potential checkouts by failing to follow up on abandoned baskets and payment failures.

VS
FLOWIFY WAY // 100% AUTOMATED

The Flowify Way (Automated Operations)

  • Real-Time Inventory Sync

    Automatically adjust stock counts across Shopify, Amazon, and ERPs down to the second to prevent overselling.

  • Instant Shiprocket Dispatch

    Auto-assign couriers, trigger shipping labels in bulk, and auto-dispatch customer tracking status.

  • WhatsApp AI Deflection

    Instantly deflect 70%+ of WISMO tickets, return queries, and basic support chats with a connected Shopify AI bot.

  • Automated Recovery Flows

    Trigger automated WhatsApp recovery messages after cart drops and checkout failures, reclaiming 15%+ revenue.

Four ways we automate your e-commerce bottlenecks.

We build custom, self-running API integrations that align your front-end store, support channels, and warehouse logistics. Hover over each setup below to see what it handles.

01

Real-Time Stock Syncing

→

Connect your Shopify store, Amazon/Myntra listings, and warehouse databases to sync stock counts down to the second. Stop losing money on stockouts, manual spreadsheet edits, and refunds for out-of-stock items.

WHAT WE USE:

Shopify Admin API / Amazon SP-API / Myntra API / PostgreSQL / Node.js

02

Automated Shipping & Dispatch

→

Auto-assign courier partners dynamically based on pricing, speed, or zone. Generate bulk shipping labels instantly, print invoice slips, and auto-dispatch tracking status updates to customers without manual operations.

WHAT WE USE:

Shiprocket API / Delhivery API / Bluedart API / WhatsApp Business API / Make.com

03

WhatsApp AI Support Bots

→

Deflect over 70% of customer support queries automatically. Our AI bots connect directly to Shopify to resolve "Where is my order?" (WISMO) requests, handle returns, process exchanges, and check refund statuses 24/7.

WHAT WE USE:

Shopify Admin API / WhatsApp Cloud API / OpenAI API / Custom Webhooks

04

Cart Recovery & Upsell Flows

→

Recover dropped sales on autopilot. Trigger intelligent WhatsApp sequences for abandoned baskets and checkout payment failures, and gather automated post-delivery reviews to scale customer lifetime value.

WHAT WE USE:

Shopify Checkout Webhooks / WhatsApp Business API / Razorpay API / Zapier / Make

Proof, not promises

Real brands. Real growth. Watch how DTC founders replaced manual fulfillment and support chaos with self-running sync engines.

FEED: IDLE
00:15 / REC
"We were losing up to 10% of our daily orders because stock numbers on Amazon, Myntra, and Shopify were disconnected. Flowily built a real-time inventory sync engine. Now stock adjustments happen down to the second across all channels. No more refunds for out-of-stock items."
RM
Rajesh MehtaFounder, Boldfit India — Bangalore
FEED: IDLE
00:15 / REC
"Our support team was drowned in hundreds of 'Where is my order?' (WISMO) WhatsApp queries daily. Flowily designed an AI WhatsApp bot. It resolves 75% of customer support tickets instantly, saving us 80+ hours of manual support work every week."
PS
Dr. Priya SharmaBrand Director, The Skin Pantry — Mumbai
FEED: IDLE
00:15 / REC
"We are a Surat-based D2C apparel brand. Shopify orders, payments, and Shiprocket dispatches were all disconnected. Flowily wired them together — now order entries auto-sync to our Tally ERP, and trigger automated WhatsApp tracking updates. Zero manual overhead."
VP
Vikram PatelFounder, ThreadCraft India — Surat
FEED: IDLE
00:15 / REC
"Checkout abandonment and payment drops were costing us lakhs of rupees. Flowily implemented an intelligent WhatsApp follow-up sequence. It triggers automated notifications for dropped carts and payment drops. Our checkout recovery rate jumped 18% in the first month."
NG
Neha GuptaOperations Head, Organic India — Delhi

Four steps to automate your brand

We work with your team to replace manual spreadsheet errors and shipping delays with self-running sync engines and support bots.

PHASE // 01

System Diagnostics

We audit your checkout flows, inventory channels, and shipping logs to pinpoint exactly where order leaks, overselling, and support bottlenecks occur.

WHAT YOU GET:
Checkout Leak MapIntegration Roadmap
PHASE // 02

Architecture Blueprint

We map out custom database schemas and API sync charts, visualizing exactly how stock updates, shipping triggers, and support bots will coordinate.

WHAT YOU GET:
API Schema DiagramWhatsApp Flow Schematics
PHASE // 03

API Integration

We connect your stack. Our team builds custom sync engines and WhatsApp AI bots integrated directly to Shopify and logistics APIs with zero store downtime.

WHAT YOU GET:
Custom Stock Sync EngineLive AI WhatsApp Bot
PHASE // 04

Live Hand-off & Support

We push the integrations live, train your fulfillment and customer service teams, and set up 24/7 monitoring to track API health and sync logs.

WHAT YOU GET:
24/7 API MonitoringOperations Team Training

Calculate how much time and money you are losing

Processing orders manually, managing stock on spreadsheets, and manually typing customer dispatches leaks profit. Calculate your savings below.

MANUAL OPS COST:₹3,00,000/mo

SCALE SCALE: GROWING BRAND

Friction Rating: Moderate. At 5,000 orders/month, manual copy-pasting addresses and stock counts creates frequent oversells. Automating Shiprocket and stock syncing will plug up to ₹28,80,000/yr in leaks.

flowify.agency

Flowify engineers high-efficiency operational software, Tally ERP integrations, WhatsApp automations, and brand-amplification platforms for Indian businesses. We replace manual bottlenecks with persistent, self-healing code.

Engine Classes

  • Bespoke Applications
  • Intelligent Automations
  • Growth Marketing Grids
  • Local Social Engines

Integration Relays

  • Tally ERP API Connect
  • WhatsApp Business Cloud API
  • Zoho Flow & Zoho CRM Relay
  • Razorpay POS Webhooks
  • IndiaMART & Justdial Ingest
